input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8771 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported javac failure is an API-signature mismatch in existing generated tests, especially maven-artifact exception constructors, not missing setup.

Executing real Maven build goals can involve local repository/settings/plugin resolution and may become network- or filesystem-sensitive; prefer direct component/API coverage or CLI help/version paths unless the test creates an isolated local project and repository.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No concrete extra dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is required before meaningful maven-core coverage is reachable; maven-core 2.0.7 resolves its old Maven/Plexus/Wagon/ClassWorlds dependencies transitively and exposes testable CLI, runtime-information, lifecycle, plugin, and diagnostics APIs without external services.
